mapper.insert: INSERT INTO energy_measurements ( plant_id, facility_id, measured_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw ) VALUES ( #{plantId}, #{facilityId}, #{measuredAt}, #{electricityKwh}, #{gasM3}, #{waterTon}, #{solarKwh}, #{peakKw} )

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) WITH ordered_measurements AS ( SELECT id, plant_id, facility_id, measured_at, DATE(measured_at) AS measured_date, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, LAG(electricity_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id, DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_electricity_kwh, LAG(gas_m3) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id, DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_gas_m3, LAG(water_ton) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id, DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_water_ton, LAG(solar_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id, DATE(measured_at) ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_solar_kwh FROM energy_measurements WHERE measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} ), daily_usage AS ( SELECT plant_id, facility_id, CAST(measured_date AS DATETIME) AS summary_at, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_electricity_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN electricity_kwh >= previous_electricity_kwh THEN electricity_kwh - previous_electricity_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS electricity_kwh, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_gas_m3 IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gas_m3 >= previous_gas_m3 THEN gas_m3 - previous_gas_m3 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS gas_m3, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_water_ton IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN water_ton >= previous_water_ton THEN water_ton - previous_water_ton ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS water_ton, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_solar_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN solar_kwh >= previous_solar_kwh THEN solar_kwh - previous_solar_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS solar_kwh, COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0) AS peak_kw FROM ordered_measurements GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id, measured_date ) SELECT plant_id, facility_id, 'DAILY', summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, ROUND(electricity_kwh * 0.47, 2) FROM daily_usage

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) SELECT plant_id, NULL, 'DAILY', summary_at, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0), COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0), COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0), COALESCE(SUM(carbon_emission), 0) FROM energy_summaries WHERE summary_type = 'DAILY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} GROUP BY plant_id, summary_at

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) SELECT plant_id, facility_id, 'MONTHLY', #{from}, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0), COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0), COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0), COALESCE(SUM(carbon_emission), 0) FROM energy_summaries WHERE summary_type = 'DAILY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at >= #{from} AND summary_at < #{to} GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id

INSERT INTO energy_summaries ( plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission ) SELECT plant_id, NULL, 'MONTHLY', #{from}, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0), COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0), COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0), COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0), COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0), COALESCE(SUM(carbon_emission), 0) FROM energy_summaries WHERE summary_type = 'MONTHLY' AND facility_id IS NOT NULL AND summary_at = #{from} GROUP BY plant_id
mapper.select: SELECT id, plant_id, facility_id, summary_type, summary_at, electricity_kwh, gas_m3, water_ton, solar_kwh, peak_kw, carbon_emission FROM energy_summaries WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND facility_id IS NULL ORDER BY summary_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

WITH bucket_facility AS ( SELECT plant_id, facility_id, FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(measured_at) / 900) * 900) AS measured_at, AVG(peak_kw) AS average_kw, MAX(peak_kw) AS max_kw FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} AND peak_kw IS NOT NULL GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id, FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(measured_at) / 900) * 900) ) SELECT measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(average_kw), 0), 2) AS average_kw, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(max_kw), 0), 2) AS max_kw FROM bucket_facility GROUP BY measured_at ORDER BY measured_at ASC

WITH ordered_measurements AS ( SELECT em.id, em.plant_id, em.facility_id, em.measured_at, em.electricity_kwh, em.peak_kw, LAG(em.electricity_kwh) OVER ( PARTITION BY em.plant_id, em.facility_id ORDER BY em.measured_at ASC, em.id ASC ) AS previous_electricity_kwh FROM energy_measurements em WHERE em.plant_id = #{plantId} AND em.measured_at >= #{from} AND em.measured_at < #{to} ), facility_usage AS ( SELECT plant_id, facility_id, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_electricity_kwh IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN electricity_kwh >= previous_electricity_kwh THEN electricity_kwh - previous_electricity_kwh ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS usage_kwh, COALESCE(MAX(peak_kw), 0) AS peak_kw FROM ordered_measurements GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id ) SELECT fu.facility_id, f.name AS facility_name, ROUND(fu.usage_kwh, 2) AS usage_kwh, ROUND(fu.peak_kw, 2) AS peak_kw, ROUND( CASE WHEN SUM(fu.usage_kwh) OVER () = 0 THEN 0 ELSE fu.usage_kwh / SUM(fu.usage_kwh) OVER () * 100 END, 1 ) AS share_rate FROM facility_usage fu JOIN facilities f ON f.id = fu.facility_id ORDER BY fu.usage_kwh DESC, fu.peak_kw DESC, fu.facility_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH bucket_facility AS ( SELECT plant_id, facility_id, FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(measured_at) / 900) * 900) AS measured_at, MAX(peak_kw) AS max_kw FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} AND peak_kw IS NOT NULL GROUP BY plant_id, facility_id, FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(measured_at) / 900) * 900) ), trend AS ( SELECT measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(max_kw), 0), 2) AS peak_kw FROM bucket_facility GROUP BY measured_at ) SELECT measured_at, peak_kw, ROUND( CASE WHEN #{thresholdKw} = 0 THEN 0 ELSE peak_kw / #{thresholdKw} * 100 END, 1 ) AS peak_usage_rate, 15 AS duration_minutes, #{thresholdKw} AS threshold_kw, peak_kw > #{thresholdKw} AS exceeded FROM trend WHERE peak_kw >= #{thresholdKw} * 0.8 ORDER BY peak_kw DESC, measured_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH latest_per_facility AS ( SELECT em.* FROM energy_measurements em JOIN ( SELECT facility_id, MAX(measured_at) AS measured_at FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} GROUP BY facility_id ) latest ON latest.facility_id = em.facility_id AND latest.measured_at = em.measured_at WHERE em.plant_id = #{plantId} ) SELECT NULL AS id, plant_id, NULL AS facility_id, MAX(measured_at) AS measured_at, COALESCE(SUM(electricity_kwh), 0) AS electricity_kwh, COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0) AS gas_m3, COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0) AS water_ton, COALESCE(SUM(solar_kwh), 0) AS solar_kwh, COALESCE(SUM(peak_kw), 0) AS peak_kw, NULL AS created_at FROM latest_per_facility GROUP BY plant_id

WITH ordered_measurements AS ( SELECT id, plant_id, facility_id, measured_at, TIMESTAMP(DATE(measured_at), MAKETIME(HOUR(measured_at), 0, 0)) AS measured_hour, gas_m3, water_ton, LAG(gas_m3) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_gas_m3, LAG(water_ton) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_water_ton FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} ) SELECT measured_hour AS measured_at, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_gas_m3 IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gas_m3 >= previous_gas_m3 THEN gas_m3 - previous_gas_m3 ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS gas_usage_m3, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_water_ton IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN water_ton >= previous_water_ton THEN water_ton - previous_water_ton ELSE 0 END ), 0), 2) AS water_usage_ton FROM ordered_measurements GROUP BY measured_hour ORDER BY measured_hour ASC

WITH latest_per_facility AS ( SELECT em.* FROM energy_measurements em JOIN ( SELECT facility_id, MAX(measured_at) AS measured_at FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} GROUP BY facility_id ) latest ON latest.facility_id = em.facility_id AND latest.measured_at = em.measured_at WHERE em.plant_id = #{plantId} ) SELECT NULL AS id, plant_id, NULL AS facility_id, MAX(measured_at) AS measured_at, NULL AS electricity_kwh, COALESCE(SUM(gas_m3), 0) AS gas_m3, COALESCE(SUM(water_ton), 0) AS water_ton, NULL AS solar_kwh, NULL AS peak_kw, NULL AS created_at FROM latest_per_facility GROUP BY plant_id

WITH latest_ranked AS ( SELECT em.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY em.facility_id ORDER BY em.measured_at DESC, em.id DESC ) AS rn FROM energy_measurements em WHERE em.plant_id = #{plantId} AND em.measured_at >= #{from} AND em.measured_at < #{to} ), latest AS ( SELECT * FROM latest_ranked WHERE rn = 1 ) SELECT f.id AS facility_id, f.name AS facility_name, CONCAT(f.name, ' 가스 계측기') AS meter_name, 'GAS' AS meter_type, COALESCE(l.gas_m3, 0) AS current_value, 'm3' AS unit, l.measured_at AS last_received_at, CASE WHEN l.measured_at IS NULL THEN 'NONE' WHEN l.measured_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MINUTE) THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE 'DELAY' END AS communication_status FROM facilities f LEFT JOIN latest l ON l.facility_id = f.id WHERE f.plant_id = #{plantId} UNION ALL SELECT f.id AS facility_id, f.name AS facility_name, CONCAT(f.name, ' 용수 계측기') AS meter_name, 'WATER' AS meter_type, COALESCE(l.water_ton, 0) AS current_value, 'ton' AS unit, l.measured_at AS last_received_at, CASE WHEN l.measured_at IS NULL THEN 'NONE' WHEN l.measured_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MINUTE) THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE 'DELAY' END AS communication_status FROM facilities f LEFT JOIN latest l ON l.facility_id = f.id WHERE f.plant_id = #{plantId} ORDER BY facility_id ASC, meter_type ASC

WITH ordered_measurements AS ( SELECT id, plant_id, facility_id, measured_at, DATE(measured_at) AS usage_date, gas_m3, water_ton, LAG(gas_m3) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_gas_m3, LAG(water_ton) OVER ( PARTITION BY plant_id, facility_id ORDER BY measured_at ASC, id ASC ) AS previous_water_ton FROM energy_measurements WHERE plant_id = #{plantId} AND measured_at >= #{from} AND measured_at < #{to} ), daily_usage AS ( SELECT usage_date, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_gas_m3 IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gas_m3 >= previous_gas_m3 THEN gas_m3 - previous_gas_m3 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS gas_usage_m3, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN previous_water_ton IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN water_ton >= previous_water_ton THEN water_ton - previous_water_ton ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS water_usage_ton FROM ordered_measurements GROUP BY usage_date ) SELECT usage_date, ROUND(gas_usage_m3, 2) AS gas_usage_m3, ROUND(water_usage_ton, 2) AS water_usage_ton, ROUND( CASE WHEN MAX(gas_usage_m3) OVER () = 0 THEN 0 ELSE gas_usage_m3 / MAX(gas_usage_m3) OVER () * 100 END, 1 ) AS gas_usage_rate, ROUND( CASE WHEN MAX(water_usage_ton) OVER () = 0 THEN 0 ELSE water_usage_ton / MAX(water_usage_ton) OVER () * 100 END, 1 ) AS water_usage_rate FROM daily_usage ORDER BY usage_date ASC
